beats.narrative: Player wakes in the starter village — stone-floored homes ringed by green grass. jan Sewi stands at the village center; jan Pona lingers in the upper plaza; jan Telo leans against the well. Walking up to jan Sewi fires the four-beat starter ceremony (toki / poki / wan / wawa) and offers the three starters: kon_moli (seli spirit), telo_jaki (telo slime), jan_ike_lili (kasi goblin). Picking one sets starter_chosen, drops three poki_lili, adds the chosen creature to the party at level 5. Until starter_chosen is true the eastern warp is non-interactive.

Long path-route east-to-west, framed by trees. Three tall_grass rectangles host the player's first encounters: jan_ike_lili, jan_utala_lili, jan_moli in the level 3-7 band — first chance to throw a poki_lili. Halfway along a sign reads 'the path was narrow.' At the eastern edge stands jan Ike, the rival, with kon_moli at level 5 and two starter moves. Defeating him (or losing — losses restore the party at the last village) opens the eastern warp.

Mountain pass — stone footpaths between rocks and tall_grass clumps. Encounters skew wawa-ish and rocky: jan_wawa, jan_wawa_linja, sijelo_kiwen. jan Kala the hiker sits along the path catching her breath, teaches lete ahead of the next region. At the top, jan Wawa — the strong-master and first jan lawa — blocks the northward path with a two-creature gym fight: jan_wawa_linja at level 8 then sijelo_kiwen at level 10. Winning sets badge_sewi and grants the reward word sewi.

Round village built on a stone island in the middle of a lake. No tall grass, no random encounters — a story-and-shop beat. jan Telo (first met at the well in ma_tomo_lili) is now revealed as the jan lawa of ma_telo with telo_jaki at level 10 and jan_ike_lili at level 12 — a deliberate type wrinkle that punishes one-typed parties. Beating him sets badge_telo and grants telo. jan Kala sits at the lake's edge with a small lost-something quest stub. jan Moku runs a lakeside stall.

Cold-land village. Stone ground with patches of grass_detail (the local tall-grass key), bordered by snow-laden trees and a fenced herb garden. Encounter table mixes sijelo_kiwen, sijelo_linja, jan_pi_sewi_pimeja, levels 7-12. jan Lete the jan lawa fields sijelo_linja level 10 and jan_pi_sewi_pimeja level 13 — first gym where a player without a seli creature feels real friction. jan Anpa watches the snow from her doorstep; jan Kasi tends the garden. Beating jan Lete sets badge_lete and grants lete.

The great peak — hardest gym before the endgame. Tall narrow map, stone everywhere, sparse tall-grass patches around rocky outcrops. Encounters are heavy elites: jan_wawa_suli, jan_wawa_utala, sijelo_utala at higher levels (10-15). jan Suli waits at the upper shrine with jan_wawa_suli level 12 (utala_lili + wawa_waso + kon_wawa) and sijelo_utala level 14 (utala + lete_wawa + lete_suli). jan pi kon meditates on a rock teaching kon; jan pi nasin asks which way is down, teaching nasin. Beating jan Suli sets badge_suli and grants suli — the canonical 'you are ready' moment.

Endgame approach. Long riverside route — wide grassy west bank, deep water channel down the east side, scattered tall-grass clumps. Heavily shadowed encounters: jan_moli, kon_moli, telo_jaki, jan_moli_wawa at the highest wild-roll levels yet (7-13). jan Kala Suli is a veteran fisher who offers an optional XP-only fight (jan_moli_wawa level 10 + telo_jaki level 11) — a tune-up before the final boss. jan Kala Lili is cheerful flavor. jan Moku Pona grills river fish at a cart. jan Olin Telo speaks quietly about the water. With all four region badges in hand, walking onto the eastern final_boss_trigger fires the akesi_sewi cutscene + final legendary catch opportunity; the green dragon's dedicated death animation plays on either defeat or capture.
